channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 18.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham could beat Farage in a general election, new poll suggests
item.description: Burnham could beat Farage in a general election, new poll suggests

item.title: BBC Politics: Starmer warns of Russian aggression as UK agrees new treaty with Poland
item.description: Starmer warns of Russian aggression as UK agrees new treaty with Poland

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): New Mandelson revelations cast doubt on claim vetting decision was borderline, Thornberry says – as it happened
item.description: New Mandelson revelations cast doubt on claim vetting decision was borderline, Thornberry says – as it happened

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Mandelson failed security vetting for US ambassador role over links to figures in China, Russia and Israel
item.description: Mandelson failed security vetting for US ambassador role over links to figures in China, Russia and Israel

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Brexiters peddled ‘nationalistic pish’, said Reform UK’s Makerfield candidate
item.description: Brexiters peddled ‘nationalistic pish’, said Reform UK’s Makerfield candidate

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting - The Guardian
Independent UK Politics: Burnham hits back at ‘out of touch’ Blair and blames centrists like him for rise of Farage
item.description: Burnham hits back at ‘out of touch’ Blair and blames centrists like him for rise of Farage

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: One of David Cameron's great advantages is that he looked exactly like what you'd get if a casting agent was told to go and get someone to play a British Prime Minister.
item.description: One of David Cameron's great advantages is that he looked exactly like what you'd get if a casting agent was told to go and get someone to play a British Prime Minister.

item.title: The Telegraph: Burnham: Blair doesn’t know what’s going on - The Telegraph
item.description: Burnham: Blair doesn’t know what’s going on - The Telegraph

item.title: The Guardian: ‘He doesn’t mention inequality once’: Burnham hits back at Blair’s Labour criticism - The Guardian
item.description: ‘He doesn’t mention inequality once’: Burnham hits back at Blair’s Labour criticism - The Guardian
